examples: I could smell pungent durian fruit, grilled satay and lemon detergent as my shoulder slapped against a line of wet laundry.

The platter with balinese satay grilled chicken wings and fried so tong.
Seow Lai Hao, 58, runs Chai Ho Satay, a hawker stall selling grilled chicken and pork satay sticks.
After dark, locals out for a night on the town mix with visitors drawn by the smoke wafting from the dozen-plus satay grills lining the complex's western edge.
